---
title: "SIR Epidemic Model"
format: html
---

# SIR Model Simulation

This project uses **agent-based modeling** and **OOP principles** to simulate an epidemic.

## Model Overview

- `Population` class: Initializes agents (susceptible, infected, recovered)  
- `SIRSimulator` class: Runs the simulation over time  
- `Visualizer` class: Handles plotting results  

## Run Simulation

```{python}
from projects.sir_model.sir_simulator import SIRSimulator
from projects.sir_model.vis import Visualizer

sim = SIRSimulator(N=500, I0=0.01, beta=0.2, mu=0.1, t_max=200)
history = sim.run()

viz = VisualizerSIR(history, title="SIR Model Infection Dynamics")
viz.plot_infection()
